description: Rigby's stale file audit proposed deleting all 15 PDFs in meetings/ without checking which ones have corresponding .md source files. Only PDFs with a matching .md (generated artifacts) are deletable — standalone PDFs without a source markdown are deliverables that must stay. SYSTEM.md Section 2 says deliverables belong next to their source markdown — the .md is the source of truth, the PDF is the build artifact.
correction: Stale file audits must cross-reference PDFs against their source .md files. Only delete PDFs that have a corresponding markdown source. Standalone PDFs are deliverables, not temp artifacts.
systemic_fix: When auditing meetings/ for deletable PDFs: for each PDF, check if a .md file with the same base name exists. If yes → generated artifact, deletable. If no → standalone deliverable, keep.
